blobs_extension_key.description: API key for accessing Azure Blob storage within the function app

default_function_key.description: Default key for invoking HTTP-triggered functions in the app

durabletask_extension_key.description: Key for enabling Durable Task functionality in Azure Functions

event_grid_extension_config_key.description: Configuration key for integrating with Azure Event Grid

event_grid_extension_key.description: Key for processing events from Azure Event Grid in the function app

primary_key.description: Main authorization key for managing Azure Function App host operations

signalr_extension_key.description: Key for connecting Azure SignalR service with the function app

webpubsub_extension_key.description: API key for integrating Azure Web PubSub service in the function app
